subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 08/16] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the nfsd.fh cache

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink support to the nfsd.fh cache in the exportd/mountd components of the NFS-utils package. It refactors existing code, introduces a new wrapper function for notification processing, and implements an expkey (nfsd.fh) netlink cache handler that resolves fsid-based lookups, including cross-mount submount iteration. The handler responds to requests via NFSD_CMD_EXPKEY_SET_REQS and uses the same nfsd genl family as svc_export.
